description: A sync log entry as read from SQLite.

assetName.description: Name of the Asset that was synced.

executionId.description: Unique identifier for this sync execution.

exitCode.description: Process exit code of the stage command.

finishedAt.description: RFC 3339 timestamp when the stage finished.

startedAt.description: RFC 3339 timestamp when the stage started.

stderrPath.description: File path where stderr output is stored.

stdoutPath.description: File path where stdout output is stored.

syncType.description: Whether this was a `sync` or `resync` operation.

title: SyncLogEntry
